arts.ttl: How Xabi Alonso could unintentionally boost Tottenham's chances of signing £50m Real Madrid target - opinion
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso could provide an accidental assist to Tottenham 🤯

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to offer Man Utd transfer target in STUNNING Xabi Alonso swap
arts.sum: Although Guler is said to prefer a move to Italy if he is to leave Real, meaning negotiations are likely to drag on despite an acceptance that Alonso will eventually replace Ancelotti in Madrid this summer. Nico Paz is another player listed as a candidate to be offered to Leverkusen despite the youngster being owned by Como, with Real first needing to activate their own buy-back clause before then sending him to the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Official | Bayer Leverkusen’s Gustavo Puerta joins Hull City
arts.sum: Bayer 04 Leverkusen and Hull City have confirmed Gustavo Puerta's permanent transfer to the Isle.

arts.ttl: REVEALED: The insane fee Real Madrid have to pay to appoint Xabi Alonso
arts.sum: Earlier this week, Sky Sports claimed that Ancelotti has already decided to throw in the towel after the Copa del Rey final on April 26, despite the fact that Real Madrid would still have to play five LaLiga matches after the clash with Clasico rivals Barcelona . Real Madrid will have to pay up to €20 million to appoint Xabi Alonso this summer, according to German media.

arts.ttl: Puerta clause activated: Leverkusen loanee to join Hull permanently from July 1st
arts.sum: Hull confirm the Colombian midfielder will remain at the club beyond his loan spell from Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: St. Pauli strive for permanent purchase of Morgan Guilavogui
arts.sum: The local Hamburger Abendblatt reports that FC St. Pauli are eager to sign attacker Morgan Guilavogui permanently.

arts.ttl: Granit Xhaka considers Bayer Leverkusen future amid Xabi Alonso and Florian Wirtz departure talks
arts.sum: Sky Germany is currently reporting that Bayer Leverkusen midfield linchpin Granit Xhaka is considering departing the club.

arts.ttl: Borussia Mönchengladbach interested in St. Pauli winger Elias Saad
arts.sum: Florian Plettenberg reports that Borussia Mönchengladbach are reportedly interested in plying Elias Saad away from FC St. Pauli.

arts.ttl: St. Pauli v Bayer Leverkusen preview: Defending champions travel to newly-promoted Pauli
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen hope to stay in the title race with a win against the in-form Pauli side.

arts.ttl: How much Real Madrid may have to pay to hire Xabi Alonso
arts.sum: Real Madrid could have to pay a record-breaking fee to break Xabi Alonso's Bayer Leverkusen contract and bring him back to the Spanish capital.
